song.title: Audience of One
song.author: Michael Weaver
song.presentation: V1 P C V2 P C B C
song.lyrics: [V1] . Bm7 G D Bm7 G D I come on my knees, To lay down before you . Bm7 G D Bm7 G D Bringing all that I am, Longing only to know you | . Bm7 G D Bm7 G D Seeking your face, And not only your hand . Bm7 G D Bm7 G D I find you embracing me, Just as I am [P] .A Bm7 G And I lift these songs to You and You alone .A Bm7 C As I sing to You in my praises make Your home [C] . G D A G D A To my audience of one, You are Father and You are Son . Bm7 G As Your Spirit flows free, Let it find within me . D/F# G A A heart that beats to praise You || . G D A G D A And now just to know You more, Has become my great reward . Bm7 G To see Your kingdom come, And Your will be done . D/F# G A Bm7 G D I only desire to be Yours, Lord [V2] So what could I bring, To honor Your majesty What song could I sing, That would move the heart of royalty | When all that I have, Is the life that You've given me So Lord let me live for You, This song with humility [B] And Lord as the love song of my life is played I have one desire to bring glory to Your name
